name: hypertaks
description: Hypertaks Founder operating mode — cross-agent plugin: sized intake gate (Express/Deep), then a dynamically tiered team of specialist agents (Lite 1 / Standard 3 / Prime 5 / Hyper 6-10+) across strategy, engineering (incl. Solidity/Web3), marketing, finance, ERP, supply chain, and IoT.
author: abrur <abrur_nic@yahoo.com>
